title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
